titleStmt.title: SII 27.137: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 137. (A.R. No. 261 of 1931-32.) KACHCHŪRU (KŌṬAKĒRI), UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab lying near the wall in the house of Nikku Mendors.
This is badly damaged record is dated Śaka 13 • •, Bahudhānya, Kārttika śu• 9, Tuesday; the other details are lost. It is in characters of about the 14th-15th century, It registers a grant of lands.
In Śaka 1380 corresponding to 1458 A.D., the tithi occurred on Monday, October 16. This might be the intended date, in which case the record will have to be assigned to Mallikārjuna.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī gaṇādhipatayē namaḥ namastuṁga sirastuṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravē trailōkya nagarāraṁbha
mūlastaṁbhāya saṁbhavē . svastiśrī jayā[dbhyudaya śāli]vāhana śakavaruṣa 13
neya bahudhānya saṁvatsarada kārtikarśu yalu śrīmanmahārājādhirāja paramēśvara
mahārāyaru duṣṭanigraha śiṣṭapālaneyaṁ sakala varnāśramaṁgaḷanū prati
pālisuttika kāladalu Āgñādhārakarappa
badly damaged
karagaḍiyiṁ mūḍalu gade hāne 24
cina guḍuna kereya kruṣṇa badabrahmadāyada mūlana bāḷagade
Aṁṇamahaṁde mādhavahaṁde gaḍiyiṁ mūḍa
lu gade hāne 45 mattaṁ dēvana gaḍiyiṁ paḍuvalu na Aṁciṁdaṁ mūḍalu gadehāne 129 mattaṁ kuṁ
ṭe kerebayalu lakṣmīnārāyaṇa dēvara gaḍiyiṁ paḍuvalu
mūḍalu maneyalu na gaḍiyiṁ paḍuvalu kartaragaḍiyiṁ mūḍa
lu gade hāne7 Aṁtu gade mu 2 hā li naḍasuva Akki mū 100
damaged
bada braṁhmadāyada mūlana bāḷagaḍi kruṣṇa
gaḍiyiṁ mūḍalu gade hā 30 Aṁtu bayaloḷage kruṣṇa gaḍiyiṁ paḍuvalu
nāraṇa bāsuriya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu gade hāne 20 mattaṁ nāraṇa bāsuri gaḍiyiṁ paḍuvalu śaṁkara
mūḍala gade hāne Aṁcina bayaloḷage vāsudēvabāsuri gaḍiyiṁ paḍuvalu Ā bāḷa
gaḍiyiṁ mūḍalu gadehāne 2[0 Aṁkadalu ṭhā]vina biḷugade
yadali naḍasū Akkimu7 braṁhmāvarada beṭṭina
hāḷaruṁ koṁmaṭhakoḍa bayaloḷage ṭhāu bada brahmadāyada mūlina bāḷagaḍi narasaṇa nāyakara gaḍiyiṁ
daṁ paḍuvalu mattaṁ parapaṇa nāyakara gaḍiyiṁ mūḍalu
karigevopi yadali naḍasuva Akki mu 15
Digital edition of SII 27.137 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
